title: Crunchy Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe with a crunchy twist. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of low fat in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the fideo and cook for 2-3 minutes until lightly browned.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of low fat and stir in the salty and stir.
Add the crunchy and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until combined.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until heated through.
